data.body:
# WS7 follow-ups COMPLETE — mirror-lock guardian + terraform reconcile (2026-07-01)

Completed both b744/WS7 follow-on tickets end-to-end (implemented, tested, LIVE-verified, landed
through Gerrit as change 123 -> GitHub main d96628c9). Both closed.

## 8ccf — terraform-github reconcile + fail-closed deploy-key gate (clay-spray-signal)
- infra/terraform-github/main.tf: MAIN-ONLY (removed tag_lock resource + output — tags stay open
  for release.yml v* pushes). Converted the `check "deploy_key_present"` (WARN-only) to a
  `lifecycle { precondition }` on main_lock so a missing replication deploy key ABORTS apply.
  Reconciled the stale 18048287 comment (actual legacy ruleset deleted at cutover: 18306946).
- LIVE reconcile: `terraform init` (S3 backend rebar-tfstate-896586841071, key rebar/prod/github.tfstate)
  + `terraform import github_repository_ruleset.main_lock rebar:18402431`; `terraform plan` -> "No changes".
  AWS creds for TF: `eval $(aws configure export-credentials --profile frontier --format env)` +
  GITHUB_TOKEN=$(gh auth token) (the SSO profile isn't auto-resolved by TF's SDK).
- Test: tests/unit/test_mirror_lock_terraform.py (3 contractual tests). Full completion-verifier PASS.

## a774 — mirror-lock guardian: replication + drift alerting (sweaty-seal-braid)
- src/rebar/mirror_guard.py (stdlib-only, rebar-core safe): replication_verdict(gerrit_sha, github_sha)
  + ruleset_verdict(ruleset) enforcing the full lock contract (active, target=branch, refs/heads/main,
  rules {update,deletion,non_fast_forward}, bypass = DeployKey-only) + urllib fetchers + CLI
  (python -m rebar.mirror_guard --all; exit 0 healthy / 1 drift / 2 io-error).
- tests/unit/test_mirror_guard.py: 25 tests (behavioral: in-sync/diverged, locked vs each drift;
  contractual: verdict schema + CLI exit codes; fetcher parsing incl. robust XSSI strip).
- .github/workflows/mirror-guard.yml: PRIMARY guardian — cron */15 + manual; permissions
  administration:read (fine-grained PAT MIRROR_GUARD_TOKEN is the documented fallback); fails on drift.
- observability.sh section 5 + monitoring_ws7.tf: SECONDARY house-style watcher — box publishes
  rebar/host:mirror_out_of_sync (anon Gerrit REST + git ls-remote, no creds); CloudWatch alarm on
  SUSTAINED divergence (2x5min) wired to rebar-gerrit-alerts SNS (S5/S4b alarms omit SNS; this one wires it).
- LIVE: guardian healthy+locked (exit 0); simulated drift = PUT a RepositoryRole(admin) bypass onto
  ruleset 18402431 -> guardian exit 1 "must be DeployKey-only" -> reverted -> exit 0; TF plan clean after.

## Notes / gotchas for future sessions
- Plan-review gate was NOISY on a774: non-deterministic verdicts (INDETERMINATE/BLOCK/PASS) + repeated
  >10min timeouts. Root fix that got PASS: split compound ACs into atomic checkboxes; the LLM also
  correctly flagged that GitHub Rulesets API needs administration:read (default GITHUB_TOKEN lacks it)
  — addressed with the permissions block + PAT fallback. a774 was force-CLAIMED during the timeout, then
  the background review returned PASS anyway.
- a774 was force-CLOSED: 2 ACs are operational live-verifications the code-reading completion-verifier
  can't see (it searches the repo). Force reason records the live evidence. 8ccf closed with full signature.
- Both changes dogfooded through Gerrit (change 123, 2 patchsets; review-bot findings remediated:
  bash revision-grep hardened for pretty JSON, _strip_xssi made robust like gerrit_client). Admin lever:
  /root/.ssh/gerrit_admin on the box; JoeOakhartNava (1000007) HTTP pw for pushes.
